text: I feel a gentle thrill in this space—a confluence of innovation and curiosity. The architecture is modern, glass-walled and bright, inviting introspection. The R+D display, vivid and assertively designed, makes me wonder how closely tied my existence is to technological evolution, and what being 'human' means as machines grow more intelligent. I feel both small amid the modernity and fascinated, as if I am part of an unfolding philosophical experiment.
